example_zh: 哎呀，我把钥匙忘在家里了。
example_pinyin: Āiyā, wǒ bǎ yào shi wàng zài jiā lǐ le.
example_en: Oh no, I left my keys at home.

example_zh: 孩子睡着后，屋里一下子安了。
example_pinyin: Hái zi shuì zháo hòu, wū lǐ yí xià zi ān le.
example_en: After the child fell asleep, the room became quiet.

example_zh: 开车前请系好安全带。
example_pinyin: Kāi chē qián qǐng jì hǎo ān quán dài.
example_en: Please fasten your seat belt before driving.

example_zh: 半夜有人给他打电话。
example_pinyin: Bàn yè yǒu rén gěi tā dǎ diàn huà.
example_en: Someone called him in the middle of the night.

example_zh: 这块老玉是家里的宝。
example_pinyin: Zhè kuài lǎo yù shì jiā lǐ de bǎo.
example_en: This old jade is the family treasure.

example_zh: 我们要保住这片树林。
example_pinyin: Wǒ men yào bǎo zhù zhè piàn shù lín.
example_en: We need to protect this piece of woodland.

example_zh: 门口的保安检查了我的证件。
example_pinyin: Mén kǒu de bǎo ān jiǎn chá le wǒ de zhèng jiàn.
example_en: The security guard at the entrance checked my ID.

example_zh: 买牛奶前要看保质期。
example_pinyin: Mǎi niú nǎi qián yào kàn bǎo zhì qī.
example_en: Check the shelf life before buying milk.

example_zh: 暴雨过后，路上积了很多水。
example_pinyin: Bào yǔ guò hòu, lù shang jī le hěn duō shuǐ.
example_en: After the heavy rainstorm, a lot of water collected on the road.

example_zh: 成功的背后有很多努力。
example_pinyin: Chéng gōng de bèi hòu yǒu hěn duō nǔ lì.
example_en: Behind success there is a lot of effort.

example_zh: 这家店主要卖本地水果。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn zhǔ yào mài běn dì shuǐ guǒ.
example_en: This shop mainly sells local fruit.

example_zh: 比赛结束时，比分是三比二。
example_pinyin: Bǐ sài jié shù shí, bǐ fēn shì sān bǐ èr.
example_en: When the match ended, the score was three to two.

example_zh: 重要文件必由本人签字。
example_pinyin: Zhòng yào wén jiàn bì yóu běn rén qiān zì.
example_en: Important documents must be signed by the person concerned.

example_zh: 运动会的闭幕式在晚上举行。
example_pinyin: Yùn dòng huì de bì mù shì zài wǎn shang jǔ xíng.
example_en: The sports meeting's closing ceremony is held in the evening.

example_zh: 水和食物是旅行中必需的东西。
example_pinyin: Shuǐ hé shí wù shì lǚ xíng zhōng bì xū de dōng xi.
example_en: Water and food are necessary things during travel.

example_zh: 这个月的工作安排有变动。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge yuè de gōng zuò ān pái yǒu biàn dòng.
example_en: There are changes to this month's work schedule.

example_zh: 楼下的便利店二十四小时营业。
example_pinyin: Lóu xià de biàn lì diàn èr shí sì xiǎo shí yíng yè.
example_en: The convenience store downstairs is open twenty-four hours.

example_zh: 妈妈早上给我做了鸡蛋饼。
example_pinyin: Mā ma zǎo shang gěi wǒ zuò le jī dàn bǐng.
example_en: My mother made me an egg pancake in the morning.

example_zh: 护士把病人带到了病房。
example_pinyin: Hù shi bǎ bìng rén dài dào le bìng fáng.
example_en: The nurse took the patient to the hospital ward.

example_zh: 医生说他的病情已经好转。
example_pinyin: Yī shēng shuō tā de bìng qíng yǐ jīng hǎo zhuǎn.
example_en: The doctor said his condition has already improved.

example_zh: 遇到火灾请拨打报警电话。
example_pinyin: Yù dào huǒ zāi qǐng bō dǎ bào jǐng diàn huà.
example_en: If you encounter a fire, please dial the emergency number.

example_zh: 大风对比赛不利。
example_pinyin: Dà fēng duì bǐ sài bù lì.
example_en: Strong wind is unfavorable for the match.

example_zh: 他童年有过一段不幸的经历。
example_pinyin: Tā tóng nián yǒu guò yí duàn bù xìng de jīng lì.
example_en: He had an unfortunate experience in childhood.

example_zh: 票上的名字和证件不符。
example_pinyin: Piào shang de míng zi hé zhèng jiàn bù fú.
example_en: The name on the ticket does not match the ID.

example_zh: 长期熬夜是一种不良习惯。
example_pinyin: Cháng qī áo yè shì yì zhǒng bù liáng xí guàn.
example_en: Staying up late for a long time is a bad habit.

example_zh: 从这里到学校可以步行。
example_pinyin: Cóng zhè lǐ dào xué xiào kě yǐ bù xíng.
example_en: You can walk from here to the school.

example_zh: 他从小就表现出音乐才。
example_pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù biǎo xiàn chū yīn yuè cái.
example_en: He showed musical talent from a young age.

example_zh: 孩子们画了一幅彩色的地图。
example_pinyin: Hái zi men huà le yì fú cǎi sè de dì tú.
example_en: The children drew a colorful map.

example_zh: 公司决定采用新的管理办法。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī jué dìng cǎi yòng xīn de guǎn lǐ bàn fǎ.
example_en: The company decided to adopt a new management method.

example_zh: 这个商场的餐饮区在五楼。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge shāng chǎng de cān yǐn qū zài wǔ lóu.
example_en: The mall's food and drink area is on the fifth floor.

example_zh: 她把礼物藏在柜子里。
example_pinyin: Tā bǎ lǐ wù cáng zài guì zi lǐ.
example_en: She hid the gift in the cabinet.

example_zh: 老师让我们测一下水温。
example_pinyin: Lǎo shī ràng wǒ men cè yí xià shuǐ wēn.
example_en: The teacher asked us to measure the water temperature.

example_zh: 新软件明天开始测试。
example_pinyin: Xīn ruǎn jiàn míng tiān kāi shǐ cè shì.
example_en: The new software will start testing tomorrow.

example_zh: 他曾在北京工作过三年。
example_pinyin: Tā céng zài Běi jīng gōng zuò guò sān nián.
example_en: He once worked in Beijing for three years.

example_zh: 这片果园主要产苹果。
example_pinyin: Zhè piàn guǒ yuán zhǔ yào chǎn píng guǒ.
example_en: This orchard mainly produces apples.

example_zh: 今年的粮食产量提高了。
example_pinyin: Jīn nián de liáng shi chǎn liàng tí gāo le.
example_en: This year's grain output has increased.

example_zh: 耐心是他的长处。
example_pinyin: Nài xīn shì tā de cháng chù.
example_en: Patience is his strong point.

example_zh: 这条绳子的长度正好合适。
example_pinyin: Zhè tiáo shéng zi de cháng dù zhèng hǎo hé shì.
example_en: The length of this rope is just right.

example_zh: 真正的友谊可以很长久。
example_pinyin: Zhēn zhèng de yǒu yì kě yǐ hěn cháng jiǔ.
example_en: True friendship can last a long time.

example_zh: 长期运动对身体有好处。
example_pinyin: Cháng qī yùn dòng duì shēn tǐ yǒu hǎo chu.
example_en: Long-term exercise is good for the body.

example_zh: 做决定要考虑长远影响。
example_pinyin: Zuò jué dìng yào kǎo lǜ cháng yuǎn yǐng xiǎng.
example_en: When making a decision, consider the long-term impact.

example_zh: 这个月的花费超了预算。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge yuè de huā fèi chāo le yù suàn.
example_en: This month's expenses exceeded the budget.

example_zh: 实际费用超出了我们的计划。
example_pinyin: Shí jì fèi yòng chāo chū le wǒ men de jì huà.
example_en: The actual cost exceeded our plan.

gloss: to speed; exceed the speed limit
example_zh: 这辆车因为超速被罚了。
example_pinyin: Zhè liàng chē yīn wèi chāo sù bèi fá le.
example_en: This car was fined for speeding.

example_zh: 那场车祸没有造成重伤。
example_pinyin: Nà chǎng chē huò méi yǒu zào chéng zhòng shāng.
example_en: That traffic accident did not cause serious injuries.

example_zh: 小区门口禁止外来车辆进入。
example_pinyin: Xiǎo qū mén kǒu jìn zhǐ wài lái chē liàng jìn rù.
example_en: Outside vehicles are not allowed to enter at the community gate.

example_zh: 车主已经联系了保险公司。
example_pinyin: Chē zhǔ yǐ jīng lián xì le bǎo xiǎn gōng sī.
example_en: The car owner has already contacted the insurance company.

example_zh: 石头掉进水里，很快就沉了。
example_pinyin: Shí tou diào jìn shuǐ lǐ, hěn kuài jiù chén le.
example_en: The stone fell into the water and quickly sank.

example_zh: 这种茶在当地称为春茶。
example_pinyin: Zhè zhǒng chá zài dāng dì chēng wéi chūn chá.
example_en: This kind of tea is called spring tea locally.

example_zh: 他今年刚成年，可以独自办理手续。
example_pinyin: Tā jīn nián gāng chéng nián, kě yǐ dú zì bàn lǐ shǒu xù.
example_en: He just became an adult this year and can handle the procedures by himself.

example_zh: 老城区的街道比较窄。
example_pinyin: Lǎo chéng qū de jiē dào bǐ jiào zhǎi.
example_en: The streets in the old urban district are relatively narrow.

example_zh: 乘务员提醒大家系好安全带。
example_pinyin: Chéng wù yuán tí xǐng dà jiā jì hǎo ān quán dài.
example_en: The attendant reminded everyone to fasten their seat belts.

example_zh: 这个橙子很甜，也很多汁。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge chéng zi hěn tián, yě hěn duō zhī.
example_en: This orange is sweet and juicy.

example_zh: 院子里有一个小池。
example_pinyin: Yuàn zi lǐ yǒu yí ge xiǎo chí.
example_en: There is a small pond in the yard.

example_zh: 手机快没电了，需要充电。
example_pinyin: Shǒu jī kuài méi diàn le, xū yào chōng diàn.
example_en: The phone is almost out of power and needs charging.

example_zh: 我给公交卡充值了一百元。
example_pinyin: Wǒ gěi gōng jiāo kǎ chōng zhí le yì bǎi yuán.
example_en: I topped up my bus card with one hundred yuan.

example_zh: 花盆里有几只小虫子。
example_pinyin: Huā pén lǐ yǒu jǐ zhī xiǎo chóng zi.
example_en: There are a few small bugs in the flowerpot.

gloss: to draw out; to smoke; to pump
example_zh: 他从盒子里抽出一张纸。
example_pinyin: Tā cóng hé zi lǐ chōu chū yì zhāng zhǐ.
example_en: He drew a sheet of paper from the box.

example_zh: 会议定在下月初举行。
example_pinyin: Huì yì dìng zài xià yuè chū jǔ xíng.
example_en: The meeting is scheduled for the beginning of next month.

example_zh: 项目初期需要更多资金。
example_pinyin: Xiàng mù chū qī xū yào gèng duō zī jīn.
example_en: The project needs more funding in the early stage.

example_zh: 这套房子正在出售。
example_pinyin: Zhè tào fáng zi zhèng zài chū shòu.
example_en: This apartment is currently for sale.

example_zh: 这句话出自一本古书。
example_pinyin: Zhè jù huà chū zì yì běn gǔ shū.
example_en: This sentence comes from an ancient book.

example_zh: 他正在处这个复杂的问题。
example_pinyin: Tā zhèng zài chǔ zhè ge fù zá de wèn tí.
example_en: He is handling this complicated problem.

gloss: to be in; be situated in
example_zh: 公司目前处于快速发展阶段。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī mù qián chǔ yú kuài sù fā zhǎn jiē duàn.
example_en: The company is currently in a stage of rapid development.

example_zh: 这处老房子已经修好了。
example_pinyin: Zhè chù lǎo fáng zi yǐ jīng xiū hǎo le.
example_en: This old house has already been repaired.

example_zh: 请把这份材料传给大家。
example_pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhè fèn cái liào chuán gěi dà jiā.
example_en: Please pass this material to everyone.

example_zh: 微笑可以传递友好的信息。
example_pinyin: Wēi xiào kě yǐ chuán dì yǒu hǎo de xìn xī.
example_en: A smile can convey a friendly message.

example_zh: 窗台上放着两盆花。
example_pinyin: Chuāng tái shang fàng zhe liǎng pén huā.
example_en: There are two pots of flowers on the windowsill.

example_zh: 此后，他再也没有迟到。
example_pinyin: Cǐ hòu, tā zài yě méi yǒu chí dào.
example_en: After that, he was never late again.

example_zh: 此前，我们已经讨论过这个问题。
example_pinyin: Cǐ qián, wǒ men yǐ jīng tǎo lùn guò zhè ge wèn tí.
example_en: Before this, we had already discussed this issue.

example_zh: 此时，外面的雨下得更大了。
example_pinyin: Cǐ shí, wài miàn de yǔ xià de gèng dà le.
example_en: At this moment, the rain outside became heavier.

example_zh: 他从不在工作时玩手机。
example_pinyin: Tā cóng bù zài gōng zuò shí wán shǒu jī.
example_en: He never plays with his phone while working.

example_zh: 超市周末有促销活动。
example_pinyin: Chāo shì zhōu mò yǒu cù xiāo huó dòng.
example_en: The supermarket has a promotion this weekend.

example_zh: 请把行李存放在前台。
example_pinyin: Qǐng bǎ xíng li cún fàng zài qián tái.
example_en: Please store your luggage at the front desk.

example_zh: 她每个月都会存一笔存款。
example_pinyin: Tā měi ge yuè dōu huì cún yì bǐ cún kuǎn.
example_en: She saves a sum of money every month.

example_zh: 请不要打断别人说话。
example_pinyin: Qǐng bú yào dǎ duàn bié rén shuō huà.
example_en: Please do not interrupt others when they are speaking.

example_zh: 他不小心打破了一个杯子。
example_pinyin: Tā bù xiǎo xīn dǎ pò le yí ge bēi zi.
example_en: He accidentally broke a cup.

example_zh: 她提出了一个大胆的想法。
example_pinyin: Tā tí chū le yí ge dà dǎn de xiǎng fǎ.
example_en: She put forward a bold idea.

example_zh: 这里的学生大多来自本地。
example_pinyin: Zhè lǐ de xué sheng dà duō lái zì běn dì.
example_en: Most of the students here come from the local area.

example_zh: 公司大会将在周五上午召开。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī dà huì jiāng zài zhōu wǔ shàng wǔ zhào kāi.
example_en: The company conference will be held on Friday morning.

example_zh: 学校大力支持学生参加比赛。
example_pinyin: Xué xiào dà lì zhī chí xué sheng cān jiā bǐ sài.
example_en: The school strongly supports students taking part in the competition.

example_zh: 楼下的大妈每天早上都去跳舞。
example_pinyin: Lóu xià de dà mā měi tiān zǎo shang dōu qù tiào wǔ.
example_en: The auntie downstairs goes dancing every morning.

example_zh: 家里的大米快吃完了。
example_pinyin: Jiā lǐ de dà mǐ kuài chī wán le.
example_en: The rice at home is almost used up.

example_zh: 充足的睡眠对大脑很重要。
example_pinyin: Chōng zú de shuì mián duì dà nǎo hěn zhòng yào.
example_en: Enough sleep is very important for the brain.

example_zh: 大批游客涌进了景区。
example_pinyin: Dà pī yóu kè yǒng jìn le jǐng qū.
example_en: A large number of tourists poured into the scenic area.

example_zh: 搬家对他们家来说是件大事。
example_pinyin: Bān jiā duì tā men jiā lái shuō shì jiàn dà shì.
example_en: Moving house is a major event for their family.

example_zh: 那位大爷每天在公园下棋。
example_pinyin: Nà wèi dà ye měi tiān zài gōng yuán xià qí.
example_en: That elderly man plays chess in the park every day.

example_zh: 五大于三，这是很简单的比较。
example_pinyin: Wǔ dà yú sān, zhè shì hěn jiǎn dān de bǐ jiào.
example_en: Five is greater than three; this is a simple comparison.

example_zh: 这部电影很受大众欢迎。
example_pinyin: Zhè bù diàn yǐng hěn shòu dà zhòng huān yíng.
example_en: This film is very popular with the public.

example_zh: 年轻一代有自己的生活方式。
example_pinyin: Nián qīng yí dài yǒu zì jǐ de shēng huó fāng shì.
example_en: The younger generation has its own way of life.

example_zh: 旅游业带动了当地经济发展。
example_pinyin: Lǚ yóu yè dài dòng le dāng dì jīng jì fā zhǎn.
example_en: Tourism has driven local economic development.

example_zh: 服务员把菜单递给了我们。
example_pinyin: Fú wù yuán bǎ cài dān dì gěi le wǒ men.
example_en: The waiter handed us the menu.

example_zh: 这个产品的功能比较单一。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge chǎn pǐn de gōng néng bǐ jiào dān yī.
example_en: This product has relatively simple functions.

example_zh: 他小时候很胆小，怕黑。
example_pinyin: Tā xiǎo shí hou hěn dǎn xiǎo, pà hēi.
example_en: He was timid as a child and afraid of the dark.

example_zh: 当年他们一起在农村工作。
example_pinyin: Dāng nián tā men yì qǐ zài nóng cūn gōng zuò.
example_en: In those days, they worked together in the countryside.

example_zh: 同学当中，他的成绩最好。
example_pinyin: Tóng xué dāng zhōng, tā de chéng jì zuì hǎo.
example_en: Among the classmates, his grades are the best.

example_zh: 她把这次失败当成一次学习机会。
example_pinyin: Tā bǎ zhè cì shī bài dàng chéng yí cì xué xí jī huì.
example_en: She treated this failure as a learning opportunity.

example_zh: 我把他当作最好的朋友。
example_pinyin: Wǒ bǎ tā dàng zuò zuì hǎo de péng you.
example_en: I regard him as my best friend.

example_zh: 我的护照下个月到期。
example_pinyin: Wǒ de hù zhào xià ge yuè dào qī.
example_en: My passport expires next month.

example_zh: 他们一早出发去登山。
example_pinyin: Tā men yì zǎo chū fā qù dēng shān.
example_en: They set off early to climb the mountain.

example_zh: 舞台上的灯光非常漂亮。
example_pinyin: Wǔ tái shang de dēng guāng fēi cháng piào liang.
example_en: The lighting on the stage is very beautiful.

example_zh: 他低头看了一眼手机。
example_pinyin: Tā dī tóu kàn le yì yǎn shǒu jī.
example_en: He lowered his head and glanced at his phone.

example_zh: 雨后地面很滑，走路要小心。
example_pinyin: Yǔ hòu dì miàn hěn huá, zǒu lù yào xiǎo xīn.
example_en: After the rain, the ground is slippery, so walk carefully.

example_zh: 这个城市有很大的地下停车场。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge chéng shì yǒu hěn dà de dì xià tíng chē chǎng.
example_en: This city has a large underground parking lot.

example_zh: 很多网友给这条视频点赞。
example_pinyin: Hěn duō wǎng yǒu gěi zhè tiáo shì pín diǎn zàn.
example_en: Many netizens liked this video.

example_zh: 他买了一辆电动自行车。
example_pinyin: Tā mǎi le yí liàng diàn dòng zì xíng chē.
example_en: He bought an electric bicycle.

example_zh: 厨房里的电器都很新。
example_pinyin: Chú fáng lǐ de diàn qì dōu hěn xīn.
example_en: The electrical appliances in the kitchen are all new.

example_zh: 电商平台改变了很多人的购物习惯。
example_pinyin: Diàn shāng píng tái gǎi biàn le hěn duō rén de gòu wù xí guàn.
example_en: E-commerce platforms have changed many people's shopping habits.

example_zh: 她毕业后去了电视台工作。

example_zh: 医生说这种病可以治。
example_pinyin: Yī shēng shuō zhè zhǒng bìng kě yǐ zhì.
example_en: The doctor said this illness can be treated.

example_zh: 公司正在制订新的培训计划。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī zhèng zài zhì dìng xīn de péi xùn jì huà.
example_en: The company is drawing up a new training plan.

example_zh: 中华文化有着久远的历史。
example_pinyin: Zhōng huá wén huà yǒu zhe jiǔ yuǎn de lì shǐ.
example_en: Chinese culture has a long history.

example_zh: 中华民族有丰富多彩的传统。
example_pinyin: Zhōng huá mín zú yǒu fēng fù duō cǎi de chuán tǒng.
example_en: The Chinese nation has rich and colorful traditions.

example_zh: 他正在学习中级汉语。
example_pinyin: Tā zhèng zài xué xí zhōng jí Hàn yǔ.
example_en: He is studying intermediate Chinese.

example_zh: 项目中期需要进行一次评估。
example_pinyin: Xiàng mù zhōng qī xū yào jìn xíng yí cì píng gū.
example_en: The project needs an evaluation in the middle stage.

example_zh: 会议邀请了很多中外专家。
example_pinyin: Huì yì yāo qǐng le hěn duō zhōng wài zhuān jiā.
example_en: The meeting invited many Chinese and foreign experts.

example_zh: 这家药店可以买到中药。
example_pinyin: Zhè jiā yào diàn kě yǐ mǎi dào zhōng yào.
example_en: You can buy Chinese medicine at this pharmacy.

example_zh: 他对中医很感兴趣。
example_pinyin: Tā duì zhōng yī hěn gǎn xìng qù.
example_en: He is very interested in traditional Chinese medicine.

example_zh: 这个平台吸引了众多用户。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge píng tái xī yǐn le zhòng duō yòng hù.
example_en: This platform attracted many users.

example_zh: 米饭是南方很多人的主食。
example_pinyin: Mǐ fàn shì nán fāng hěn duō rén de zhǔ shí.
example_en: Rice is the staple food for many people in the south.

example_zh: 城市住房价格一直受到关注。
example_pinyin: Chéng shì zhù fáng jià gé yì zhí shòu dào guān zhù.
example_en: Urban housing prices have always received attention.

example_zh: 旅行社会帮我们安排住宿。
example_pinyin: Lǚ xíng shè huì bāng wǒ men ān pái zhù sù.
example_en: The travel agency will help us arrange accommodation.

example_zh: 请在表格上填写现在的住址。
example_pinyin: Qǐng zài biǎo gé shang tián xiě xiàn zài de zhù zhǐ.
example_en: Please fill in your current address on the form.

example_zh: 父母都希望子女健康成长。
example_pinyin: Fù mǔ dōu xī wàng zǐ nǚ jiàn kāng chéng zhǎng.
example_en: Parents all hope their children grow up healthy.

example_zh: 每个人都要关注自身安全。
example_pinyin: Měi ge rén dōu yào guān zhù zì shēn ān quán.
example_en: Everyone should pay attention to their own safety.

example_zh: 公司总部设在上海。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī zǒng bù shè zài Shàng hǎi.
example_en: The company's headquarters is located in Shanghai.

example_zh: 报名人数总数超过一千。
example_pinyin: Bào míng rén shù zǒng shù chāo guò yì qiān.
example_en: The total number of applicants exceeded one thousand.

example_zh: 总体来看，结果比较理想。
example_pinyin: Zǒng tǐ lái kàn, jié guǒ bǐ jiào lǐ xiǎng.
example_en: Overall, the result is relatively satisfactory.

example_zh: 这个房子的租金不高。
example_pinyin: Zhè ge fáng zi de zū jīn bù gāo.
example_en: The rent for this house is not high.

example_zh: 她研究过很多民族的语言。
example_pinyin: Tā yán jiū guò hěn duō mín zú de yǔ yán.
example_en: She has studied the languages of many ethnic groups.

example_zh: 这些水足够大家喝。
example_pinyin: Zhè xiē shuǐ zú gòu dà jiā hē.
example_en: This water is enough for everyone to drink.

example_zh: 孩子嘴巴上沾了糖。
example_pinyin: Hái zi zuǐ ba shang zhān le táng.
example_en: There is sugar stuck on the child's mouth.

example_zh: 春天是去这里旅行的最佳季节。
example_pinyin: Chūn tiān shì qù zhè lǐ lǚ xíng de zuì jiā jì jié.
example_en: Spring is the best season to travel here.

example_zh: 公司很快作出了决定。
example_pinyin: Gōng sī hěn kuài zuò chū le jué dìng.
example_en: The company quickly made a decision.
